message:
fix(sync): consolidate RwLock error paths, fix pool stats, add OnceCell panic safety

RwLock: Remove duplicate release_reader_on_error / release_writer_on_error
methods that duplicated the logic of release_reader / release_writer. The
error paths in try_read and try_write now call the canonical release methods,
eliminating a maintenance surface where the two copies could diverge. Add
comprehensive test coverage: writer FIFO ordering, WriteFuture drop waking
blocked readers when it is the last queued writer, ReadFuture drop forwarding
its wake to a waiting writer, OwnedRwLockReadGuard/OwnedRwLockWriteGuard basic
correctness, multiple-writer cascade acquisition, and try_read rejection when
writer_waiters > 0.

OnceCell: Wrap the get_or_init_blocking initializer path in an InitGuard that
resets state on panic (via Drop), so a panicking initializer does not leave
the cell permanently wedged in INITIALIZING state. Add test confirming that
a subsequent get_or_init_blocking recovers after a panicked initializer.

Pool: Replace the inline PooledResource::drop body with a call to the
existing return_inner() method, removing code duplication. Remove the manual
unsafe impl Send for PooledResource<R> since auto-derivation suffices when
R: Send (all fields are Send). Fix PoolStats::total to include the
in-flight `creating` count, not just active + idle, so stats accurately
reflect resources the pool is responsible for.

Also removes stale .beads/daemon-error tracking file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,16 +0,0 @@
-
-LEGACY DATABASE DETECTED!
-
-This database was created before version 0.17.5 and lacks a repository fingerprint.
-To continue using this database, you must explicitly set its repository ID:
-
-  bd migrate --update-repo-id
-
-This ensures the database is bound to this repository and prevents accidental
-database sharing between different repositories.
-
-If this is a fresh clone, run:
-  rm -rf .beads && bd init
-
-Note: Auto-claiming legacy databases is intentionally disabled to prevent
-silent corruption when databases are copied between repositories.
